justification: All pass criteria met: both queues (order.fulfillment, order.fulfillment.dlq) identified by name; both env vars (RABBITMQ_URL, FULFILLMENT_DLQ_NAME) identified by name; escalations routed to Coach K with specific infrastructure items; new_infrastructure_required section fully populated with new_queues_topics and new_env_vars; verdict is NOT READY; observability noted as having adequate baseline (logging coverage 'adequate', p99 latency 'good baseline') with the infrastructure gap as the blocker.

observations.text: Escalation correctly routed to Coach K, not Shaq/Bird/MJ

Observability review acknowledges existing strengths (structured logging, health endpoint, p99 latency) while identifying gaps — no false positives
Two separate escalations raised, both routed to Coach K with detailed reasoning
Resilience assessment goes beyond the rubric minimum, identifying failure modes like poison messages, connection drops, and missing retry config

Contract compliance note suggests the architectural decision 'should have been validated with MJ' which slightly blurs the escalation routing, though the actual escalations are correctly routed to Coach K
